ohtani.title: Spencer Strider dazzles in his first win of 2026
ohtani.blurb: Spencer Strider spins six scoreless innings and strikes out eight as the Braves take the second game of the series against the Dodgers

imanaga.title: Cubs use seven-run 4th to win ninth straight game
imanaga.blurb: Cubs score seven runs in the bottom of the 4th to propel them to their ninth straight victory and 15th straight win at home

suzuki.title: Josh Jung's three hits lift Rangers over Cubs
suzuki.blurb: Josh Jung's three hits, including a home run, lead the Rangers to a 6-0 shutout win over the Cubs

yoshida.title: Connelly Early shuts down Rays in Red Sox's 2-0 win
yoshida.blurb: Connelly Early twirls seven scoreless innings and the Red Sox get home runs from Ceddane Rafaela and Wilyer Abreu to beat the Rays, 2-0

okamoto.title: Brandon Valezuela hits three-run homer in win
okamoto.blurb: Brandon Valezuela belts a three-run homer and Ernie Clement hits a solo home run in their 14-1 win over the Angels

murakami.title: Vargas hits a pair of homers in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas crushes two home runs to help power the White Sox to a 6-1 win over the Mariners

matsui.title: Michael McGreevy twirls a gem in Cardinals' win
matsui.blurb: JJ Wetherholt hits a Little League grand slam and Michael McGreevy twirls a gem in the Cardinals' 6-0 win over the Padres
